newAdditiveFields.renderedReason: string - enriched display reason from factorSnapshot (if available) else original reasonSnapshot
newAdditiveFields.renderedReasonFactorCount: number - count of factor dimensions in renderedReason
newAdditiveFields.dataAvailabilityNote: string - neutral data availability note when missingSources present, empty string otherwise

inputExtension.usedSources: string[] optional - for data availability note
inputExtension.missingSources: string[] optional - for data availability note
